THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FITZER, CHARLES FRIEDMAN, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAN, KEITH FAN, STEVEN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00, PHOTO EVIDENCE SHOWS DEFENDANT KEITH FAN AT FAULT.
